name: Mei
description: A mobile Tank who controls and disrupts the battlefield with weather-altering technology
title: Adventuring Climatologist
info: A brilliant mind with a sunny disposition, Dr. Mei-Ling Zhou joined Overwatch to help solve the world's growing climate problems. Armed with a host of weather-altering technologies, Mei now fights to protect her friends and secure a future for a troubled world.

Mei.name: Snow Blind
Mei.description: Throw a snowball that hits all enemies in an area. Enemies hit take 70 (+4% per level) damage, are Slowed by 35%, and are Blinded for 1.75 seconds.

Mei.name: Blizzard
Mei.description: Command Snowball to create a Blizzard at the target location for 2 seconds. Enemies within the blizzard take 13 (+4% per level) damage every 0.25 seconds and are Slowed by 7%, stacking up to 35%. When the Blizzard ends, enemies within its area take an additional 75 (+4% per level) damage and are Stunned for 1.25 seconds.

Mei.name: Icing
Mei.description: Slide quickly in the targeted direction. When this effect ends, enemies near Mei are knocked back, take 52 (+4% per level) damage, and are Slowed by 80%, rapidly decaying over 1.5 seconds.  Can be canceled during sliding.

Mei.name: Avalanche
Mei.description: After 0.5 seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing 220 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds per Hero consumed.

Mei.name: Ice Wall
Mei.description: Vector Targeting After a 0.75 second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are Slowed by 75%, decaying over 3 seconds.

Mei.name: Cryo-Freeze
Mei.description: Become encased in ice for 3 seconds, gaining a rapidly decaying Shield that absorbs up to 1104 (+4% per level) damage. While active, this Shield grants Unstoppable and restores up to 35% of Mei's maximum Health.

1.name: Heavy Pack
1.description: Increases the duration of Snow Blind's Slow by 1.5 seconds. Each time Blizzard damages an enemy Hero, reduce the cooldown of Snow Blind by 0.5 seconds and gain 3 Mana.

1.name: Ice Storm
1.description: Every 3rd hit of Blizzard against enemy Heroes deals an additional 42 (+4% per level) damage. Blizzard's final Stun damage is increased by 150% against all enemies.

1.name: Heat Transfer
1.description: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed Heroes deal 33% more damage. Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero she heals for 16 (+4% per level) Health.

4.name: Slushball
4.description: Snow Blind deals 75% increased damage and Structures hit are disabled for 3 seconds.

4.name: Cold Front
4.description: Reduce the cooldown of Icing by 3 seconds. If Mei enters her own Blizzard while Icing is active, the cooldown of Icing is reduced by 5 seconds and she gains 80 Mana.

4.name: Crystallize
4.description: Reduce the cooldown of Cryo-Freeze by 10 seconds. Mei gains 40 Spell Armor while Cryo-Freeze is active and for 1 second after.

7.name: Induce Hibernation
7.description: Blizzard reduces the damage dealt by enemy Heroes inside of its area by 40%.  When Blizzard ends, enemy Heroes still within its area gain this effect for an additional 4 seconds.

7.name: Skating Away
7.description: When Icing ends, Mei and all nearby allied Heroes gain 20% Movement Speed and 50 Physical Armor for 3 seconds.

7.name: Backup Battery
7.description: Activate to remove all Roots and Slows and regenerate 20% of maximum Health over 2 seconds. The cooldown of this ability is reduced by 10 seconds each time Mei picks up a Regeneration Globe.

10.name: Avalanche
10.description: After 0.5 seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing 220 (+4% per level) damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds per Hero consumed.

10.name: Ice Wall
10.description: Vector Targeting After a 0.75 second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are Slowed by 75%, decaying over 3 seconds.

13.name: Flurry
13.description: While in her own Blizzard, Mei gains 50% increased Attack Speed and Blizzard's cooldown refreshes 125% faster. If Mei is in her own Blizzard when it ends, gain these bonuses for 3 additional seconds.

13.name: Cooling Servos
13.description: While Cryo-Freeze is active, Mei's Basic Ability cooldowns recover 200% faster.  Passive: Basic Attacks Slow by 20% for 1.5 seconds.

13.name: Polar Vortex
13.description: Using an ability causes Mei to deal 24 (+4% per level) damage a second to nearby enemies for 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes damaged by this effect also have their Movement Speed and Attack Speed Slowed by 20%.

16.name: Fresh Powder
16.description: Snow Blind gains an additional charge and its range is increased by 33%.

16.name: Black Ice
16.description: Icing's Slow effect no longer decays over its duration. Icing deals 300% more damage to enemies very close to Mei.

16.name: Acclimation
16.description: Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero, the damage she deals and healing she receives is increased by 1%, stacking up to 20 times. While at maximum stacks, Mei also gains 10 Armor. Lasts 8 seconds.

20.name: Cascade
20.description: While traveling, Avalanche constantly launches a volley of untalented Snow Blind snowballs ahead of itself.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Avalanche by 30 seconds.

20.name: Shatter
20.description: When Ice Wall expires, trapped enemy Heroes hit take 210 (+4% per level) damage and have their Armor reduced by 25 for 5 seconds.

20.name: The Big One
20.description: Every 15 seconds, the next Snow Blind you cast has 67% increased area and 200% increased damage.

20.name: Flash Freeze
20.description: When Mei takes fatal damage she instantly gains Cryo-Freeze. This effect has a 180 second cooldown.

tooltipMarkup.MeiOWAcclimation: Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero, the damage she deals and healing she receives is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,MeiOWAcclimationBuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Basic]"/>%</c>, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWAcclimationBuff,MaxStackCount"/></c> times. While at maximum stacks, Mei also gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWAcclimationArmorCarry,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWAcclimationBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWAvalanche: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,MeiOWAvalanche,CastIntroTime+.0625" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWAvalancheDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Stunning them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,MeiAvalancheStunUnitTrackerAccumulator,Scale" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds per Hero consumed.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWBackupBattery: Activate to remove all Roots and Slows and regenerate <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWBackupBatteryHoT,PeriodCount*(100*Effect,MeiOWBackupBatteryPeriodicHealer,RechargeVitalFraction)"/>%</c> of maximum Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWBackupBatteryHoT,Duration"precision="1"/></c> seconds. The cooldown of this ability is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,MeiOWBackupBatteryModifyCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds each time Mei picks up a Regeneration Globe.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWBlackIce: Icing's Slow effect no longer decays over its duration. Icing deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MeiOWIcingDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BlackIce].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage to enemies very close to Mei.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWBlizzard: Command Snowball to create a Blizzard at the target location for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWBlizzardSearchPersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]*Effect,MeiOWBlizzardSearchPersistent,PeriodCount" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds. Enemies within the blizzard take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWBlizzardDamage,Amount"/></c> damage every <c val="#TooltipNumbers">0.25</c> seconds and are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardSlowDebuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c>, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardSlowDebuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-10)*Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardSlowDebuff,MaxStackCount" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c>. When the Blizzard ends, enemies within its area take an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWBlizzardFinalExplosionDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and are Stunned for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardStun,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWBlizzardIceStorm: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardIceStormDamageCounterToken,Max" precision="2" player="0"/>rd</c> hit of Blizzard against enemy Heroes deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWBlizzardIceStormPeriodicDamage,Amount"/></c> damage. Blizzard's final Stun damage is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MeiOWBlizzardFinalExplosionDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[MeiOWBlizzardIceStorm].Modifier"/>%</c> against all enemies.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWCascade: While traveling, Avalanche constantly launches a volley of untalented Snow Blind snowballs ahead of itself.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce the cooldown of Avalanche by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,MeiOWCascade,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWColdFront: Reduce the cooldown of Icing by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,MeiOWColdFront,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds. If Mei enters her own Blizzard while Icing is active, the cooldown of Icing is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,MeiOWIcingColdFrontTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds and she gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWIcingColdFrontTalentModifyUnit,VitalArray[Energy].Change"/></c> Mana.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWCryoFreeze: Become encased in ice for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWCryoFreezeShieldBuff,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds, gaining a rapidly decaying Shield that absorbs up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWCryoFreezeShieldBuff,DamageResponse.ModifyLimit*Behavior,MeiOWCryoFreezeShieldBuff,MaxStackCount"/></c> damage. While active, this Shield grants Unstoppable and restores up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,MeiOWCryoFreezeCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*(Behavior,MeiOWCryoFreezeShieldStackController,Duration/Behavior,MeiOWCryoFreezeShieldStackController,Period))*100" player="0"/>%</c> of Mei's maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWCryoFreezeCoolingServos: While Cryo-Freeze is active, Mei's Basic Ability cooldowns recover <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,MeiOWCryoFreezeCoolingServosTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,MeiOWCryoFreezeCoolingServosCooldownReductionBuff,Period*100"/>%</c> faster.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Basic Attacks Slow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,MeiOWCoolingServosSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWCoolingServosSlow,Duration"precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWCrystallize: Reduce the cooldown of Cryo-Freeze by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,MeiOWCrystallize,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> seconds. Mei gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWCryoFreezeCrystallizeTalentArmorBuff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor while Cryo-Freeze is active and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWCryoFreezeCrystallizeTalentArmorBuffDuration,Duration"/></c> second after.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWFlashFreeze: When Mei takes fatal damage she instantly gains Cryo-Freeze. This effect has a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,MeiOWCryoFreezeFlashFreezeTalentHotbar,Cost.Cooldown.TimeUse"/></c> second cooldown.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWFlurry: While in her own Blizzard, Mei gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardFlurryTalentBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>% </c>increased Attack Speed and Blizzard's cooldown refreshes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Effect,MeiOWBlizzardFlurryTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardFlurryTalentBuff,Period"/>%</c> faster. If Mei is in her own Blizzard when it ends, gain these bonuses for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardFlurryTalentBonusBuff,Duration"/></c> additional seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWFreshPowder: Snow Blind gains an additional charge and its range is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,MeiOWFreshPowder,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value/Abil,MeiOWSnowBlind,Range"player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWHeatTransfer: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed Heroes deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MeiOWHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[HeatTransfer].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage. Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero she heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWHeatTransferProcHeal,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWHeavyPack: Increases the duration of Snow Blind's Slow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,MeiOWHeavyPack,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" precision="2"/></c> seconds. Each time Blizzard damages an enemy Hero, reduce the cooldown of Snow Blind by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,MeiOWBlizzardHeavyPackTalentModifyUnit,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse"precision="3"/></c> seconds and gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiSnowBlindHeavyPackManaRestoration,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWIceWall: <c val="#TooltipNumbers">Vector Targeting</c><n/>After a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWIceWallInitialCreatePersistent,ExpireDelay" precision="2" player="0"/></c> second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWIceWallTimeStopDebuff,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWIceWallSlowDebuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c>, decaying over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWIceWallSlowDebuff,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWIcing: Slide quickly in the targeted direction. When this effect ends, enemies near Mei are knocked back, take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWIcingDamage,Amount"/></c> damage, and are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,MeiOWIcingSlowDebuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" player="0"/>%</c>, rapidly decaying over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWIcingSlowDebuff,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.</n></n>Can be canceled during sliding.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWInduceHibernation: Blizzard reduces the damage dealt by enemy Heroes inside of its area by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardInduceHibernationTalentDamageReductionDebuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]*100*(-1)"/>%</c>. <n/><n/>When Blizzard ends, enemy Heroes still within its area gain this effect for an additional <C val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWBlizzardInduceHibernationTalentDamageReductionBonusDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWPolarVortex: Using an ability causes Mei to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWPolarVortexDamage,Amount/(Behavior,MeiOWPolarVortexBuff,Period)"/></c> damage a second to nearby enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWPolarVortexBuff,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds. Enemy Heroes damaged by this effect also have their Movement Speed and Attack Speed Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,MeiOWPolarVortexSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWShatter: When Ice Wall expires, trapped enemy Heroes hit take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWIceWallShatterTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and have their Armor reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,MeiOWIceWallShatterTalentArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWIceWallShatterTalentArmorDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWSkatingAway: When Icing ends, Mei and all nearby allied Heroes gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,MeiOWIcingSkatingAwayTalentSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> Movement Speed and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWIcingSkatingAwayTalentArmorBuff,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[0].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> Physical Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWIcingSkatingAwayTalentSpeedBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWSlushball: Snow Blind deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MeiOWSnowBlindDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Slushball].Modifier"/>%</c> increased damage and Structures hit are disabled for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWSnowBlindSlushballTalentStructureDisable,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWSnowBlind: Throw a snowball that hits all enemies in an area. Enemies hit take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MeiOWSnowBlindDamage,Amount"/></c> damage, are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWSnowBlindSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c>, and are Blinded for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWSnowBlindBlind,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MeiOWTheBigOne: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MeiOWSnowBlindTheBigOneTalentCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, the next Snow Blind you cast has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(-1+(Effect,MeiOWSnowBlindTheBigOneImpactSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius/Effect,MeiOWSnowBlindImpactSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius))"precision="0"player="0"/>%</c> increased area and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MeiOWSnowBlindTheBigOneDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[TheBigOne].Modifier"/>%</c> increased damage.
